author: @stewartpalmer2456
text: Just an FYI. For a clear resin and excellent clarity results, I used an alcohol cleanup based resin for my lens. Water washable clear resins aren't there yet. But the liquid clear alcohol resins yellow fast in the bottle. So use it quick. Don't over stock yourself.

author: @justtinkering6713
text: Maybe someone could come up with a version of this that uses gelatin or syrup to 3D print food items.

author: @SimonPlatten
text: Hi Robert, with regard to print material, what is the quantity required to do a print and is the cost for a quantity of material to do the print comparable or less than the cost of filament?

author: @lephtovermeet
text: Is the part post cured or green? AFAIK there's nothing special about the printer which causes clarity, it's entirely dependent on the resin formula. I've had several "clear" resins in the past that look pretty good off the plate but as soon as you cure them they yellow. Then again I never invested in any proper, expensive, engineering resins, pretty much just consumer stuff.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: It's post cured mate - the machine being 16k helps with body density but you are right a lot is down to the resin - I used one marked as non yellowing and it was UK£40 a litre

I am a high school student working on a senior project exploring alternatives to stainless steel electrodes building my own dry cell .

author: @aquahoodjd
text:
But undertaking this project actually combines many aspects of your YouTube designs including super capacitors batteries, wind turbine, solar panels, and then a little bit from others etc etc so it's a multidiscipline project and I've even learned how to use and train deep machine learning models create agents program microcontrollers and raspberry pies like single board computers and use various distro of Linux. Micropython circuit python and Jennifer notebooks numpy, pytorch...R, SAS, SPSS, Nvivo 9,, FreeCAD, tinkercad, Klipper, Kicad 9, I started with Arduino IDE but now I use Microsoft Virtual studio with its extensions and even some AI code generation or checking as well as cursor. But I'm slowly building up the various competencies that would at least allow me to oversee the project if not try and accomplish the project alone but this is quite an expensive endeavor. I'm trying to go back to work as I'm getting close to cure and they want me to take a course of three to six months of MDMA and I do too. After reading the research studies it's absolutely clear that in 3 months if you're dedicated to your therapy and I'm all in you can lose the definition under the ICD-10 or 11 soon to come and the DSM-5 or 6. So it's an actual cure but it's in adjunctive to therapy you have to be all into your therapy which I'm already. I became myself after 12 months and since then I've been developing a stronger emotional maturity which is wiped out by that disorder it's terrible. But you totally pull in and you become socially isolated, you have psychosomatic illness as it can cause you to feel like you're ill and you're not It's so bizarre because I'm a scientist and a lawyer and I just can't believe how tangible and real the effects of your mind are on your body.

We now know that stress has a direct influence on disease states and recent publications on this particular disorder have actual physiological lasting effects if not fully treated. This means increased inflammation increased levels of cortisol and increased heart rate blood pressure you're stuck in fight or flight. You also have abnormal reactions to environment and emotional stressors so it's irrational and illogical and I know it which makes it even worse now that I'm almost there with the first three months we're an absolute nightmare and I almost detached from reality during those 3 months and they told me it would be an inverse recovery curve. I would say I'm on the back end so the upward slope of the other side of the inverse curve but given the severity of my complex post-traumatic stress disorder that would be very challenging for most people and still quite challenging for myself even though I'm 100% aware of everything and have no lack of IQ or creativity but my EQ was wiped out completely and that's what their focusing on rebuilding. 

I quite literally could put on my suit and run not just one but several multinational corporations as I've already done it and sat on the board of a hedge fund ran small businesses medium businesses and was about to be named to the board of a TSX listed company on the Toronto stock exchange. 

And then a non-allied country dropped into my life and their culture does not seem to forget or forgive even though I really had nothing to do with anything that took place in that country. My job was to make sure that my client paid all of his US taxes and I ran everything outside of the United of Russia just to be plainly clear because the UK I know has no love for FSB or GRU which is the correct term.  Federal police confirmed that there were five to seven verified GRU hunting me here in my country just after he was assassinated and after I negotiated some court case settlements with a gun to my head I might add, I went to grounds and got lost not to mention my brain being on a completely different planet. That all came back 12 months ago as well as all of my memories as I have photographic memory. That's like insult to injury having photographic memory and complex post-traumatic stress disorder these are two things you most assuredly do not want a loan or together. 


Sure the photographic memory helps with your academic pursuits etc but the reality is most people do not remember what they've said or what they did even days after but I can quote verbatim and see situations from two decades ago and when the other people cannot it can become very socially difficult to navigate. 

I'm learning how to do that again and I'm not at all and a person of ego but I'm a humble person as I believe in a creator I'm a man of faith. I believe in the fine tuning arguments and the teleological argument but also I had a religious experience which led me now to the ability to recover. 

If I hadn't had that experience I am 100% certain that I would not be talking to you right now. I was in a bad place I packed my bags took a shower got on a plane and did a 180 because I was in an emotional foxhole using things to help me stay in that emotional foxhole and that day I stopped and stayed in the hotel by myself for 2 weeks with the curtains drawn ordering juice and food liquids It was a nightmare That was a nightmare. I was in Borneo and then after two or three weeks I went back to what I knew would help my body recover and I started diving and I didn't stop for 2 years. 


I then came back to Europe thinking that things would have assuredly gone away and they had not they were waiting for me. That's when they try it again for the third time and it was covered up none of the three separate identical statements I gave made it into the police record and only the testimony of three people who were all related none of the hundreds of people standing around none of the two dozen CCT cameras and not one single word of my statement made it into the police record. I gave three statements and I could describe to you the three individuals to this day to a sketch artist as they were at the time. 

Everything went great when they sent me here to Bern and it works for about a year and they've now found ways to manipulate my life here and my therapy has slowed, I've been waiting for 8 9 months now for MDMA that even my social worker shrugged as she was in the meeting with three doctors all of whom agreed and the one doctor who could give it to me agreed was sitting there and she asked me why are you not on it already and I said don't ask it'll make me angry. 

I've also needed a shoulder surgery following a hip replacement all injuries from that day The other being a very slow leak into my pelvis of fluid causing a cyst. They replaced the head and poked a bunch of holes in the cyst and it's gone but it was extremely painful It was the largest cyst the local tertiary hospital had ever seen and that part of a person's body. 

The hips went great it was fixed within 3 months of me returning and they even put my hip in the freezer to use in my shoulder. And then all the sudden everything stopped to paint drying and not my trauma therapy but my shoulder was about to break and they knew it and they let it break. That is criminal gross medical negligence and you think I can afford a lawyer much less and my doctors would all agree but for some reason I can do nothing? 

All three of my main doctors now know I've been saying I'm screaming because this is unjust and my human rights are being a bridges. I hope they're listening and they said they were now I need patience to see if it actually has or will change anything. 

Under ideal circumstances if things work as they're supposed to here I could be cured and fixed within 6 months. Yeah everyday and every week I'm watching time go by and doing my therapy and seeing nothing else progress. 

Anyone out there who may be able to help me with either my underwater project and another water health project that I have in mind which also incorporates this Mr Murray's designs based on a survey by the UK epidemiological survey called the beach bum survey regarding pharmaceuticals and their metabolites and the emergence and evolution of e coli and other coliforms. 


I have a real time bench science level analysis buoy in my brain which uses a mesh network and a local private wide area network to monitor an entire water course with off the shelf components and alternative energy as well as the multitude of different types of mesh network designs with Bluetooth now expanding to 10 km with line of sight. 

Even Wi-Fi extenders with directional antennas and reflectors brewsters easy and inexpensive just the ESP 32 now. Not to mention the Bluetooth or Lorawan fro safelight. You can compress your findings with codes and use numbers to designate certain conditions to pack your data within the duty cycle requirements and packet size requirements and gather the raw data more slowly perhaps via another direction. 

Water conditions water flow presence of bacteria presence of parasites and even dumping but 250 million children worldwide are affected by poor water which stunts their mental and physical development and this is all mostly around the equator. 

But the beach from survey was about biofilms that have established themselves in swimmers and surfers around the UK move that south into warmer waters and my toxicology professor at the time said to me a number of other potential problems from that. The fact that it can be aerosolized and other potential problems not to mention that we do not understand very well the interaction between the freshwater and pelagic zones where they meet...

replies.author: @aquahoodjd
replies.text:
You can see my love for the sea combined with my love for my hobbies as well as having a certificate in the law of the sea from the University of Geneva School of Law post doc. Honestly I summarized the entire course in my first essay to the professor as that certificate could be wrapped up in a single essay if you have the level and understanding of treaties and international law both public and private that I have experienced already in my career.

Anybody in Switzerland the UK or the US who has an interest in helping me help myself recover and to fight against ongoing delay crossword people who are worried about me regaining a very good reputation that I had before as well as the things I know that they have done both directly and indirectly and what they have done to me personally. 

They are afraid of me recovering. They're doing everything they can to delay that recovery. So if you're still upset about the FSB agent who was killed on UK soil with polonium my client had the front page of your newspaper in London framed on his bedroom wall in one of his houses. He. Knew what he was doing.... He was boldly and directly attacking Vladimir Putin and his one of his active ministers at the time who is no longer a minister as he was found guilty by an ICC arbitration tribunal which broke confidentiality for the first time in history finding overwhelming evidence of theft of state assets and money laundering by the counterparty I will make clear. 

Anyone who can help me in either the United States and Switzerland with legal representation and that's the first start as well as making sure that I'm giving the MDMA that all my doctors want me to have and is on the compassionate use and for some reason they're not letting me have it. This is with the witness directly of my state appointed social worker in a meeting with her and three medical doctors all of whom stated I have all the indications and no contraindications and that they want me on this medication and that was 8 months ago. So I have been unnecessarily suffering for far too long and this is a violation of my human rights and just smacks the whole idea of compassionate use. So far I've not found many people willing to help me out even though I've reached out but I'm really asking for help and helping my medical team help me. 

They will speak for me as you may or may not believe me or not but you would believe them I assume. So sure I will let my medical team and my social workers speak on my behalf because I'm all in and being all in and having things go completely sideways by no means nor desire of my own and I only want to return to work. I have a place to work and an opportunity at this very moment and they think that by returning to a work environment that challenges me that takes advantage of my quite unique level of resiliency, raw intelligence, and ability to honestly and respect as well as my creativity etc they think I can be more productive and successful upon completion of my therapy and I agree I know. 

But I need help because things are not going the way that they should and I have had this experience before while I was compromised in Geneva which is why I live where I live now and that protection lasted for about 12 months just enough time for me to become myself again no longer on a different planet but very aware of everything I've lost and everything everyone did to me. I don't care about any of that I want to go back to work and try and not only assist a former student of mine as her business has grown far beyond her abilities and she needs some assistance but also realize some of my projects which have application directly to helping the health and wellness of people who are financially depressed in their situations. 

I want to start a secondary school to attach to my former students international primary school which will be a stem magnet school in the coral triangle. Half the students will pay and half the students will be students who score highly with STEM aptitude so gifted STEM students with an international baccalaureate and advanced placement classes and hopefully evolving to remote engineering courses as they live around three different countries and none of these people would ever be able to see the inside of a secondary much less post-secondary education and if they're gifted we could be losing the next Einstein. But it's a very minimum The school will have goals to try and achieve with our students and the students will have their own goals and they will have to come up with a project to address both... That's how they will pass along with the required other courses. Students that will pass from this secondary magnet school will without question be sought after by some of the best engineering schools around the world. And perhaps even oceanographic and ocean biology etc there's even the opportunity to perhaps explore testing of habitats to be used on other planets and moons as the sea is a perfect analog. Not only can you wear your spacesuit underwater and they do but it's microgravity. Testing the structural integrity both from a pressurized outward environment but inward as well as downdrafts microbursts violent wind storms could create pressures that equal those that you would experience underwater. Everything needs to be that structurally sound and to be sustainable it needs to be closed circuit. So how many plants How much power to provide the light necessary How many micronutrients in kilograms to add to dead soil or a medium? Waste reclamation micro nuclear reactors that are safe and do not make or taint the surrounding environments and the sea is a perfect analog for that as well. We can be assured and make sure that none of this leaks that we don't contaminate the environment and that we know exactly how to build a biosphere that is self-contained under very similar conditions without the need put that mass into space first. I don't know why we're not doing it already?

author: @aquahoodjd
text:
Robert could you re-do graphene supercaps with what we know now? Also, using anything new we have developed? Why did you retire? You are awesome. I am recovering from "combat level" complex post-traumatic stress where it mostly started 36 hours following a trip to the UK from Geneva. I have not returned to the UK since - 🇨🇭. I received a phone call 36 hours after my afternoon flight from City Airport to Geneva flight they used to run morning and afternoon. I was visiting a client who would be assassinated and they came for me after... I didn't have anything to do with the reason he was assassinated but was merely his Barrister/Solicitor - I have a U.S. Jurist Doctor and a was admitted to the Geneva Bar (ODAGE) and my client (to be honest at that time he was probably my best friend as well). So, that hit hard then followed by three assassination attempts (one while under close personal protection, one torture abroad, and another by three Eastern Europeans at 7:30 am , work day , Rive Tram stop downtown Geneva (500m away from my apartment, saw the same three people the day before, they tired to break my neck from behind and I dropped to my knees, stood up in a triangle). It went quick but I moved just right to not die but they all took head shots resulting in 5 surgeries and a 6th surgery still needed. 

I have my own 3d printer, am very interested in material science, want to eventually make a swarm of semi-autonomous underwater vehicles small but compact with off the shelf components (Lawrence, Hummingbird, and or Garmin) multispectral sonar (fish finders) using a dialectic liquid for both cooling and structurall integrity. They would have magneticn(rotation for attach and detach), a deployable stator for opportunistic currents for recharging), fold out solar panels, passive hydrophones for anti theft (surfacing only when all seems quite) unfolding solar panels and a pop up wind turbine. But 25-50 swarms for mapping the ocean floor with insane detail as there's no way you could get the detail that you could get from a prosumer multispectral off-the-shelf fish finder from Lawrence or hummingbird for example which can actually sense into the set of it to some degree by being up close and personal to the floor so an average operating depth of 801 ATA which is just the average depth of the Pacific plain. Obviously, I would like it to go at times deeper to map trenches and so forth but the average depth would be fantastic as I don't care how sophisticated your side scanning or towed sonar array is There is no way you're getting the detail from 25 to 50 overlapping by 25% small drones that are up close through all of the thermoclines, temperature differences, differences in salinity, differences in turbidity, and currents for example as these all create multipath for sonars and it would be impossible to get the clarity and into the sediment to some level if you're close at the same time having a universal payload bus so that universities and other researchers can design their own experiments to plug in so plug and play experiment bay for this commercial scientific product. I think as the designer and maker it may be even more profitable to run your own fleet of these for 5 years in a very $365 days a year 24 hours a day mode as the data that you collect could be worth more than the entire cost of development and production of the fleet and then after you can sell them once you have recouped your investment and production and development of your first fleet by selling the data itself as well so out of the 25 or 50 that you are using for mapping You designate 10 to 15 for doing chemical analysis, taking biological samples of sediment, and other tasks of sensing such as salinity temperature current assisting with the others and their distribution place in the water column basically a shepherd's and other support vehicles for the mappers. In an emergency a small two both CO2 or just air and a small metal capsule at that depth could inflate an extremely strong and large lift bag to rescue any of your drones from depth at a very quick and strong amount of lift as just that small tiny amount of compressed air deployed into a very strong lift bag with Kevlar etc would inflate to an enormous size due to the fact that you have 8,000 m of water on top of your particular device That's the purpose of the dielectric liquid is to reinforce the structural integrity. The Challenger deep vehicle used glass beads ceramic and epoxy and for most of the structure and only the human capsule which was a spherical titanium capsule had metal and you wouldn't want any metal if you could as it could also skew not only your positioning systems because you're going on inertial guidance once you leave the surface unless you deploy a GPS receiver via the same airlift bag small wire or fiber optic to the surface. Then because of drift is if you don't have a perfectly vertical line you're not going to have a perfectly accurate position but getting close is good enough as long as you're drones have started to build a map of the various structures you can use those structures as waypoints and determine their exact location on the bottom and then restart from that point or use those points to help your continuing Matthew progression. But I think it's very important that we do scientific analyzes of the water column there as we really don't even know how quickly the water turns around at that depth It could be hundreds of years old or not We don't know but total dissolved oxygen salinity taking samples for deeper chemical analysis taking samples for more life science analysis so that would be tricky as you would want them to undergo slow decompression to not explode the cell walls so a very slow assent They might have to deploy the capsules separately to ascend so that they go very very slowly allowing the cells or the organisms to adjust to the various depths and pressures. That's 800 + 1 atmospheres at 8000 m because you start at 1:00 at the surface. I teach diving and I'm a lawyer also have a master's degree in public health and I have two different agencies completely dedicated to technical diving and have all of the certificates from one and Tech One from GUE. I took the GUE Tech One test because my buddy told me I could pass it and said that unbeknownst to me at that time I was one of the most elite technical divers at least in the top 1% of people worldwide because I was diving three times a day at times and had gone on several expeditions including to the HMS Hermes off the coast of Sri Lanka just after the cessation of the Civil War. That was the first purpose built aircraft carrier and we got the plans from the UK as the owner of the shop who doesn't dive anymore because of having gone through decompression illness You're more susceptible once you've had it. But I was paired with a diver who was from the UK who doesn't dive that often and I was diving daily so I was there more as an assistant dive master or more experienced diver along with a person who dives occasionally. I had just spent a lot of time training underwater and civic Bay Philippines on the USS Houston the HMAS Perth and on the USS New York which is on the bottom of the subic Bay the others are in the Java Sea. There's also a aircraft that they sunk in the subic Bay purposefully for training technical diving that's not very deep it's just for doing your initial courses.

author: @przemekkobel4874
text: Many people use extensive protection against any contact with resin or its fumes. Are the exaggerating, or your ventilation is good enough to not care about resin particles getting absorbed by skin and then cured by sun's UV?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: There is a level of safety that makes sense - like don't go drinking or bathing in the stuff but what I have found is that beyond that the consideration of what is safe changes from person to person. In my opinion some folks go completely overboard - but that is there choice - some people think I am too flippant, but that is my choice. It really is up to you to determine what is safe for you and go with that.

replies.author: @thebytespider
replies.text: it's worth noting that some people can have allergic reactions with the resin. I'm quite cavalier with the resin, but I'm usually quick to wash it off with hot soapy water with no ill effects 🤞

author: @yasirrakhurrafat1142
text:
Hello sir!
I think the first topic you glossed over could really be appreciated by the maker community.
I think they'd really be interested to learn about making cheap filament (spool) from raw pellets!
I would love to see a video on that if you do so.
Also, if the pellets are usually white and uncolored, how to dye them different colors.

Aslo, I have a question, you know any way to turn opaque, white or otherwise plastics to clear transparent plastic??

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: There are loads of videos on that mate and plenty of DIY solutions from stripping bottles to filastruder type machines - I even made one a few years ago and did a video - Plastics aren't dyed they use coloured fillers as particulate material - you would have to remove that - that's quite a task

replies.author: @yasirrakhurrafat1142
replies.text:
@ThinkingandTinkering alrighty.
Although the filastruder seems like it is a great deal of hassle. I've seen videos on it, and it really has diminishing returns for the amount of babysitting and processing the recycling takes.
And I'd still say a video on making more affordable filament from pellets would hold much potential.
Aside from that.
I'd love to see the potential you could unlock with this new printer you bought though. I was thinking something like a 3d prism, maybe fresnel lenses, or otherwise lenses for very particular kinds of optical uses. Would be interesting to see.
Also, if you know any method of making rubbery structures with the common resin, using a compatible plasticiser. Would love to know if you find out!
I try and look things up, but information is either not very accessible, or obscured with jargon (sometimes the jargon isn't even worth reading, as it doesn't provide- or deliberately avoids providing and information of good value).
I hope I get better at finding good research and reading and potentially interpreting papers intuitively.

author: @dorronski463
text: Mate im surprised you didn't put some flg in your resins by now see how hard it could become, and have some pellets with the and FLG/HDPU batch mix you did? Could any of your printers do the temperature needed?

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: The real key is dispersion - you can chuck some FLG in their but if you don't mix it properly all it will do is turn everything grey. To get any kind of real improvement you need to disperse it properly and that is not as simple as giving a jolly good stir with a spoon. A K600 would do a nice job but they are over 1 grand each

author: @SierraNovemberKilo
text: I can see vintage car restorers being very interested in that ability to create clear lenses....who'd have thought! Amazing. Even ignoramus' like me are beginning to look seriously into this 3D printing malarkey. You have opened a lot of eyes and minds. Ta.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: It really does have a lot of potential and the whole thing is progressing pretty quickly mate

replies.author: @serge4302
replies.text: That would be great. What about over-exposure of uv sunlight, would that make the resin prints brittle?

author: @yannmassard3970
text: hello, nice ! is the non subdivided mesh wanted ? would according to me have look way better with a smooth surface

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I agree it would - I just did a quick model for the demo - but you are right more attention tot he mesh is needed

author: @JC-bk3gd
text: Thanks!  Recently discovered your channel and have been trying to work through the back catalogue.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: awesome - cheers mate

author: @richspillman4191
text: Oh my virgin eyes, you've been whacked by the sex spam bots! Can resin printers do lite weight foaming for RC planes? I burned up my ender and won't be going cheap again.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: yep - it's a pain i remove them and ban them whenever i see them - but they are such a a pain! That's a good question - I don't really know to be honest - so i am going to look into it - cheers
